name: Charlie Schlinkert
headline: Data, software, and music—with the human part left in.
introduction: I’m Charlie: a data scientist, lifelong musician, and proud father. I like turning messy questions into useful systems, then explaining them in plain English.
about: My path has moved through jazz clubs, operations floors, sales teams, and data platforms. The through-line is curiosity: learn the system, find the rhythm, and make the work clearer for the people around it.

cards.title: Data & software
cards.body: Python, analytics, machine learning, and the infrastructure that makes good ideas dependable.

cards.title: Notes & experiments
cards.body: Projects, technical write-ups, and occasional investigations into things I’m curious about.

cards.title: Music
cards.body: Before data, there were drums and vibraphone—six years recording and touring with Del Water Gap, and music still made whenever possible.
